_comment: State-scheme variant (Tamil Nadu CMCHIS). Same shape as pmjay.json but note the differences flagged below: TPA/insurer model, grade-tiered pricing (A1-A6), TN-specific code namespace, and a per-hospital specialty empanelment grid. Phase 2.
name: Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme (Tamil Nadu)

hospital_applicability._comment: CMCHIS gates package eligibility per-hospital via a 47-specialty boolean grid (from tpa-hospitals.csv). Pre-auth MUST verify the hospital is flagged true for the requested specialty, and route DPU* diagnostic packages only to centres whose permitted list includes that code.

differences_from_pmjay: Codes are TN-specific (CMU/CM/DF/TA/DPU) and DO NOT map to national HBP procedure codes — needs its own package master.
Rates vary by hospital grade A1-A6, not a single national rate.
Administered via TPA/insurer (tpa=MA), not the NHA trust/TMS model.
Package eligibility is gated per-hospital by a 47-specialty boolean grid.
NK48 injury-category packages and a separate Govt-Reserved list are TN-specific constructs.
